positive: A vibrant and whimsical abstract mural featuring geometric woodland animals and flora. The main subject is a stylized group of forest creatures (fox, owl, deer, bunny) rendered in clean, thick silhouettes with playful poses. Incorporate elements of celestial patterns, constellations, and lush foliage (mushrooms, ferns, stylized leaves). The color palette should be harmonious and rich: deep emerald green, dusty indigo blue, burnt orange, and creamy beige. The style should be highly decorative and illustration-based, reminiscent of modern Scandinavian folk art and detailed children's book illustrations. Use strong outlines and a limited gradient wash background to ensure high contrast and print readability. Center composition, perfect for repeat pattern or apparel print.
